name: Andrew Maxwell
blurb: Andrew Maxwell is an Irish comedian and broadcaster who began stand-up in Dublin in 1992 and became a fixture of the British and Irish circuits.
bio: Andrew Maxwell is an Irish comedian and broadcaster who began stand-up in Dublin in 1992 and became a fixture of the British and Irish circuits. He is a regular panellist on shows including Mock the Week and The Panel, and runs the long-running late-night comedy night Fullmooners. He has also worked extensively as a narrator and television presenter.

timeline.ev: First stand-up at the Comedy Cellar, Dublin
Regular appearances on BBC Two Sunday Show
Joins RTE panel show The Panel
Nominated for the if.comedy award at Edinburgh
Begins narrating MTV series Ex on the Beach
Competes on I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here

accolades: Voted King of Comedy on Channel 4
Long-running host of the Fullmooners comedy night
